summary: Backend-only Task 12 validation passed. Evidence summary packaging and deterministic markdown sections behave as requested; full regression remains green.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for Task 12 scope.
critical_code_review_comments: evidence_summary.py is a packaging-only layer and correctly reuses run_metric_validation_suite(), run_validation_with_summary(config), and validate_behavioral_separation(summary) without introducing new evaluator logic.
Claims are explicit and each includes evidence_links via evidence_keys, covering both metric_validation_details.* and behavioral_separation_checks.* sources.
render_evidence_summary_markdown() is deterministic and includes exactly the reviewer-facing sections required: Metric Validity, Baseline Separation, and Claims.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests/test_evidence_summary.py -v --tb=short and full suite pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short with JUnit output files for iteration 13. All checks passed. NO MOCKED APIs involved.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration; requested evidence-summary packaging behavior is implemented and regression-safe.
